categories.label: Digital
categories.description: Digital design projects involving logic design, FPGA workflows, verification, timing, and ASIC-oriented architecture.

categories.label: Embedded
categories.description: MCU-based systems with firmware, board bring-up, interfaces, sensing, control, and hardware/software integration.

subsections.description: I enjoy creating projects from the ground up as well as reverse engineering existing ones, taking them from the initial idea to full realization.
